The '''Cleft Head''' wake-up house was a bar located in the immigrant section of [[ChikatLik]] on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. It served a thousand legal stimulants from a hundred [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], such as [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] [[Tatooine H'Kak bean tea|H'Kak bean tea]]. The Cleft Head's clientele consisted predominantly of office workers seeking to enhance their stamina. It was speculated that within the bar access to illegal substances was also easily arranged.

The Cleft Head was the location of an unofficial rendezvous between [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and Reagent [[G'Mai Duris]] during the [[Mission to Ord Cestus]].
